description: Vanilla Breeze performance budget. Targets A+ carbon rating (~270KB transfer for a typical page).

framework.description: Framework core — tokens, reset, native-elements, custom-elements registry
framework.note: Minified and gzipped. Excludes individual component files.

per_component.description: Budget per individual component (CSS + JS combined)
per_component.note: Components are loaded on demand, not as a bundle.

fonts.note: Use variable fonts and Latin subset where possible.

images.description: Total image budget per page (excludes hero/editorial images)
images.note: Use modern formats (WebP, AVIF). Hero images assessed separately.

theme.description: Per theme bundle including fonts declared by theme

demo_site.description: Full demo page target (framework + 3 components + 1 theme + content)
demo_site.note: This is the A+ carbon rating target.
